bridge_functions.name: Audio.play
bridge_functions.description: Play an audio file from a URL or local path

bridge_functions.name: Audio.pause
bridge_functions.description: Pause the current audio playback

bridge_functions.name: Audio.resume
bridge_functions.description: Resume the paused audio playback

bridge_functions.name: Audio.stop
bridge_functions.description: Stop the audio playback and reset the position

bridge_functions.name: Audio.seek
bridge_functions.description: Seek to a specific position in the audio (in seconds)

bridge_functions.name: Audio.setVolume
bridge_functions.description: Set the audio volume (0.0 to 1.0)

bridge_functions.name: Audio.getDuration
bridge_functions.description: Get the duration of the current audio in seconds

bridge_functions.name: Audio.getCurrentPosition
bridge_functions.description: Get the current playback position in seconds

bridge_functions.name: Audio.setMetadata
bridge_functions.description: Set track metadata (title, artist, album, artwork) for lock screens and media centers

bridge_functions.name: Audio.setPlaylist
bridge_functions.description: Set the playlist queue natively so tracks can auto-advance

bridge_functions.name: Audio.nextTrack
bridge_functions.description: Skip to the next track in the active playlist

bridge_functions.name: Audio.previousTrack
bridge_functions.description: Skip to the previous track in the active playlist

bridge_functions.name: Audio.setSleepTimer
bridge_functions.description: Stop playback after a set number of seconds

bridge_functions.name: Audio.setPlaybackRate
bridge_functions.description: Change the audio playback speed (e.g., 0.5 to 2.0)

bridge_functions.name: Audio.load
bridge_functions.description: Load an audio file without starting playback

bridge_functions.name: Audio.getState
bridge_functions.description: Get the full current playback and playlist state

bridge_functions.name: Audio.setRepeatMode
bridge_functions.description: Set repeat mode: none, one, all

bridge_functions.name: Audio.setShuffleMode
bridge_functions.description: Enable or disable shuffle mode

bridge_functions.name: Audio.appendTrack
bridge_functions.description: Add a track to the end of the current playlist

bridge_functions.name: Audio.removeTrack
bridge_functions.description: Remove a track by its index from the current playlist

bridge_functions.name: Audio.setProgressInterval
bridge_functions.description: Set how often progress update events fire (in seconds)

bridge_functions.name: Audio.drainEvents
bridge_functions.description: Clear and return all events queued while in the background

info_plist.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: We need access to your music library to play audio files.
